profitability.action: stock is the drag; the evidence says short-horizon stock MR is weak

survivability.action: hold; let it accrue out-of-sample trades

statistical_confidence.action: the only fix is time; let it trade

governance.action: none — selection is evidence-driven, no manual overrides

attribution_explainability.why: 5/5 forensic engines live (exit, opportunity, regime, recovery, capture)

market_separation.why: crypto and stock run independent arenas + champions
market_separation.action: metals/energy remain placeholders until they have data

operational_health.why: workflows share a concurrency group, atomic writes, snapshots recording
operational_health.action: do one pristine reset after 2.5.1 to start clean

production_readiness.why: research platform, not yet a trading system; needs proven forward edge
production_readiness.action: do not deploy real capital until survivability holds past 50+ trades

headline: SILMARIL 4.8/10 — legitimate research platform; not yet a trading system
note: Honest self-grade each cycle. Confidence and production readiness stay low until trades are real.
